name: A${}^2$BM: Alignment-Aware Bridge Matching for Image-to-Image Translation
summary: arXiv:2607.16294v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Paired image-to-image translation underpins a wide range of computer vision tasks, including image editing, sensor translation, and domain adaptati...
description: arXiv:2607.16294v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Paired image-to-image translation underpins a wide range of computer vision tasks, including image editing, sensor translation, and domain adaptation. Bridge matching and flow matching have recently emerged as powerful frameworks, extending diffusion models to arbitrary source and target distributions. However, their standard formulations assume...
author: Aimi Okabayashi (UBS Vannes), Georges Le Bellier (LIP, CEDRIC - VERTIGO), Nicolas Audebert (LaSTIG, IGN, CEDRIC - VERTIGO), Charlotte Pelletier (OBELIX), Thomas Corpetti (LETG - Rennes), Nicolas Courty (OBELIX)
